alerts.title: Controller alarm or error register set
alerts.message: Device telemetry reports an active alarm/error bit.
alerts.likelyCause: Controller fault or communication error register is active.
alerts.recommendedAction: Read the Modbus register, inspect controller wiring, then clear and observe.
alerts.evidenceSummary: Error register active across 7270 samples.

alerts.title: Sharp negative thermal residual
alerts.message: The room is colder than expected from the physics model.
alerts.likelyCause: Door/ventilation event, defrost dip, or sudden capacity loss.
alerts.recommendedAction: Confirm whether this coincides with defrost; if sustained, inspect airflow and envelope leakage.
alerts.evidenceSummary: Residual evidence peaked at 0.25 degC across 3 samples.

alerts.title: Setpoint not reached
alerts.message: Room temperature remains far from setpoint while conditioning is required.
alerts.likelyCause: Extended conditioning could not reach target; likely envelope loss, refrigerant low, or undersizing.
alerts.recommendedAction: Check whether preheat was long enough, then inspect capacity, refrigerant, filters, and envelope leakage.
alerts.evidenceSummary: Setpoint miss persisted for 22 samples with max residual 0.15 degC.

alerts.title: Sustained colder-than-model residual

alerts.recommendedAction: Inspect airflow, filters, door/vent state, and refrigerant pressure trend.

alerts.recommendedAction: Check occupancy, solar exposure, and sensor agreement with peer pumps.
